scope_fit_note: Honest STRETCH on seniority: JD requires 7 yrs L&D incl 5 yrs developing programs FOR LEADERS (Required), plus 'people manager / leading teams' context. Jamie ~3 yrs, no direct reports. Disclosed candidly in cover ('I'm earlier in my career than that... I haven't managed a team directly'). Her REAL leader-facing L&D assets used: Vestas Inclusive-Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders -> 23 locations; NextGen manager-effectiveness + DEI/leadership consulting + 2,000+ survey analysis; ODN NGO leadership-team diagnostic. JD names Articulate360/Vyond (she lacks) -> NOT claimed. Master's (preferred) -> she has it. AI Learning Pathways focus connects to her real RAG-build anecdote + adult-learning grounding. Pushed forward per recalibrated rules (only explicit no-sponsorship is a hard stop).

login_note: Signed into existing account jamiecheng0103@gmail.com via shared ATS password (read from ~/Downloads/job_password.txt at fill-time, NEVER printed/committed). KEY WORKDAY LEARNING: .fill() did NOT trigger React onChange (form silently refused to submit with no error); re-typing credentials with press_sequentially (real keystrokes) made Workday register them and sign-in succeeded. Transient 'Something went wrong' on first My Information load -> resolved by page reload.
